headline_seed: Judge Declines, for Now, to Block Mail-In Voting Changes Ordered by Trump - The New York Times
draft_text:
Judge Carl Nichols declined to block Trump's March 31 mail-in voting order, ruling the challenge premature. Plaintiffs include Sen. Schumer and LULAC. A separate case is pending in Boston, per AP and NPR.

And that's the mews.
